creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
textproc/aspell fails to install.  It appears something is not right about the commands in pkg-plist:

jcooper@borgdemon2 /usr/ports/textproc/aspell                                   > sudo make deinstall reinstall
===>  Deinstalling for textproc/aspell
===>   aspell not installed, skipping
===>  Installing for aspell-0.60.5
===>   aspell-0.60.5 depends on shared library: iconv.3 - found
===>   aspell-0.60.5 depends on shared library: intl - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if textproc/aspell already installed
Making install in .
gmake[1]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/aspell/work/aspell-0.60.5'
gmake[2]: Entering directory `/usr/ports/textproc/aspell/work/aspell-0.60.5'
test -z "/usr/local/lib" || ./install-sh -c -d "/usr/local/lib"
 /bin/sh ./libtool --mode=install /usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel  'libaspell.la' '/usr/local/lib/libaspell.la'
/usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel .libs/libaspell.so.16 /usr/local/lib/libaspell.so.16
(cd /usr/local/lib && { ln -s -f libaspell.so.16 libaspell.so || { rm -f libaspell.so && ln -s libaspell.so.16 libaspell.so; }; })
(cd /usr/local/lib && { ln -s -f libaspell.so.16 libaspell.so || { rm -f libaspell.so && ln -s libaspell.so.16 libaspell.so; }; })

/usr/bin/install -c -o root -g wheel .libs/libaspell.a /usr/local/lib/libaspell.a
chmod 644 /usr/local/lib/libaspell.a
ranlib /usr/local/lib/libaspell.a
